zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George John Calvert於1525年10月8日出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親William Calvert25歲，母親Marjorie Alyse de Crossland22歲。他於1540年與Dorothy Lennard在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟結婚。他們至少是15個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1566年9月5日在他的家鄉享年40歲，埋葬在英國越可爾米德萊斯布盧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George John Calvert于1525年10月8日出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲William Calvert25岁，母亲Marjorie Alyse de Crossland22岁。他于1540年与Dorothy Lennard在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟结婚。他们至少是15个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1566年9月5日在他的家乡享年40岁，埋葬在英国越可爾米德萊斯布盧。

nameMeanings.name: Calvert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): occupational name from Middle English calfhirde, from Old English (Anglian) calf ‘calf’ + hierde ‘herdsman’.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George John Calvert was born on 8 October 1525, in Yorkshire, England, his father, William Calvert, was 25 and his mother, Marjorie Alyse de Crossland, was 22. He married Dorothy Lennard in 1540, in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 15 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 5 September 1566, in his hometown, at the age of 40, and was buried in Middlesbrough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George John Calvert est né le 8 octobre 1525, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Calvert, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Marjorie Alyse de Crossland, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy Lennard en 1540, à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 15 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 5 septembre 1566, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Middlesbrough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George John Calvert am 8. Oktober 1525 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Calvert 25 und seine Mutter Marjorie Alyse de Crossland 22. Er hat 1540 in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England Dorothy Lennard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 15 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 5. September 1566 im Alter von 40 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Middlesbrough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George John Calvert è nato il il 8 ottobre 1525 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Calvert, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Marjorie Alyse de Crossland, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Dorothy Lennard nel 1540, nel Herstmonceux, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 15 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 5 settembre 1566, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Middlesbrough, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir George John Calvertが1525年10月8日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Calvertは25歳，母Marjorie Alyse de Crosslandは22歳であった。1540年にイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックスでDorothy Lennardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも15人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1566年9月5日に故郷で40歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアミッドレスブロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George John Calvert(이)가 1525년 10월 8일 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Calvert(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjorie Alyse de Crossland(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1540년 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스에서 Dorothy Lennard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1566년 9월 5일 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 미들레스브루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George John Calvert nasceu em 8 de outubro de 1525, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Calvert, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Marjorie Alyse de Crossland, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Lennard em 1540, em Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 15 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de setembro de 1566, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Middlesbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George John Calvert родился 8 октября 1525 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Calvert было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjorie Alyse de Crossland, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Lennard в 1540 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 15 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 5 сентября 1566 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности миддлесброую, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Dorothy Lennard en 1540, en Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 15 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 5 de septiembre de 1566, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Middlesbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
